channel.title: Chainlink on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Chainlink on Archive 03

item.title: Chainlink: The Hidden Plumber of the RWA Era?
item.description: Chainlink ($LINK) aims to be the connectivity infrastructure for on-chain finance through RWA tokenization, oracles, and CCIP. We examine whether it is the essential plumbing for the tokenization era or just overpriced middleware.

item.title: Chainlink ($LINK): A Deep Dive into the Oracle King, Price Analysis, and Future Outlook
item.description: As the core infrastructure connecting blockchains to the real world, does Chainlink ($LINK) have a bright future? We dive into a sharp debate between Kurumi, who champions Chainlink’s monopolistic position and growth potential as a Web3 necessity, and Mikael, who warns of potential risks like market dependency and uncertain tokenomics, to analyze the pros and cons of investing in $LINK.
